title: Product Listing
content:
PS-001 — Product Listing & Add to Cart 
Module: Product Listing 
Tags: regression, smoke 
Priority: High

Description: Verify that a user can view the product list, sort products, add/remove products from the cart, and navigate to the product details page after successfully logging into the application.

Acceptance Criteria:
* User should be able to login to the application using valid credentials.
* User should be redirected to the Inventory (Product Listing) page after successful login.
* User should be able to view all available products on the page.
* User should be able to see product name, price, description, and image for each product.
* User should be able to click the "Add to Cart" button for a product.
* User should be able to see the cart icon updated with the item count.
* User should be able to see the "Add to Cart" button change to "Remove".
* User should be able to click the "Remove" button to remove the product from the cart.
* User should be able to verify the cart count is updated after removal.
* User should be able to click on a product and navigate to the Product Detail page.
* User should be able to view product details on the Product Detail page.
* User should be able to navigate back to the Product Listing page.

Test Data:
Environment: https://www.saucedemo.com/
Username: standard_user
Password: secret_sauce
Product Data: Product Name: Sauce Labs Backpack
